code: export const formatCurrency=value=>new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US',{style:'currency',currency:'USD',maximumFractionDigits:2}).format(value||0);export const formatDate=value=>new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US',{month:'short',day:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}).format(new Date(value));export const getMonthValue=function(){let date=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:new Date();const month=`${date.getMonth()+1}`.padStart(2,'0');return`${date.getFullYear()}-${month}`;};
